name: quantoracle
description: 63 deterministic quant computation tools for autonomous financial agents. Options pricing, exotic derivatives, risk metrics, technical indicators, Monte Carlo, portfolio optimization, crypto/DeFi, macro/FX, statistical analysis, time value of money. Includes 6 composite tools (spread-scan, regime-classify, risk tearsheet, trade-evaluate, portfolio-health, pairs-signal) and a batch endpoint for up to 100 computations per request. 1,000 free calls/day -- no signup required.

tools.name: options_price
tools.description: Black-Scholes pricing with 10 Greeks (delta, gamma, theta, vega, rho, and higher-order)

tools.name: implied_vol
tools.description: Newton-Raphson implied volatility solver from market price

tools.name: options_strategy
tools.description: Multi-leg options strategy P&L, breakevens, max profit/loss, risk/reward

tools.name: payoff_diagram
tools.description: Multi-leg options payoff diagram data generation

tools.name: binomial_tree
tools.description: CRR binomial tree pricing for American and European options

tools.name: barrier_option
tools.description: Barrier option pricing (up/down, in/out) using analytical formulas

tools.name: asian_option
tools.description: Asian option pricing: geometric closed-form or arithmetic approximation

tools.name: lookback_option
tools.description: Lookback option pricing (floating/fixed strike, Goldman-Sosin-Gatto)

tools.name: option_chain_analysis
tools.description: Option chain analytics: skew, max pain, put-call ratios

tools.name: put_call_parity
tools.description: Put-call parity check and arbitrage detection

tools.name: volatility_surface
tools.description: Build implied volatility surface from market data

tools.name: portfolio_risk
tools.description: 22 risk metrics: Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar, Omega, VaR, CVaR, drawdown, skew, kurtosis

tools.name: kelly_criterion
tools.description: Kelly Criterion: optimal bet sizing from win probability and payoff ratio

tools.name: position_size
tools.description: Fixed fractional position sizing with risk/reward targets

tools.name: drawdown
tools.description: Drawdown decomposition: max, average, recovery time, underwater curve

tools.name: correlation
tools.description: N x N correlation and covariance matrices from return series

tools.name: var_parametric
tools.description: Parametric Value-at-Risk and Conditional VaR (Expected Shortfall)

tools.name: stress_test
tools.description: Portfolio stress test across multiple user-defined scenarios

tools.name: transaction_cost
tools.description: Transaction cost model: commission + half-spread + Almgren square-root market impact

tools.name: technical
tools.description: 13 technical indicators (SMA, EMA, RSI, MACD, Stochastic, etc.) with composite signals

tools.name: regime
tools.description: Trend + volatility regime detection with composite risk classification

tools.name: crossover
tools.description: Golden/death cross detection with signal history

tools.name: bollinger_bands
tools.description: Bollinger Bands with %B, bandwidth, and squeeze detection

tools.name: fibonacci
tools.description: Fibonacci retracement and extension levels

tools.name: atr
tools.description: Average True Range with normalized ATR and volatility regime

tools.name: montecarlo
tools.description: GBM Monte Carlo simulation with contributions/withdrawals, up to 5000 paths

tools.name: bond
tools.description: Bond price, Macaulay/modified duration, convexity, DV01

tools.name: amortization
tools.description: Full amortization schedule with extra payment savings analysis

tools.name: yield_curve
tools.description: Yield curve interpolation: linear, cubic spline, or Nelson-Siegel

tools.name: credit_spread
tools.description: Credit spread and Z-spread from bond price vs risk-free curve

tools.name: optimize
tools.description: Portfolio optimization: max Sharpe, min variance, or risk parity

tools.name: risk_parity
tools.description: Equal risk contribution portfolio weights

tools.name: linear_regression
tools.description: OLS linear regression with R-squared, t-stats, standard errors

tools.name: polynomial_regression
tools.description: Polynomial regression of degree n with goodness-of-fit metrics

tools.name: cointegration
tools.description: Engle-Granger cointegration test with hedge ratio and half-life

tools.name: hurst_exponent
tools.description: Hurst exponent via rescaled range (R/S) analysis for mean-reversion detection

tools.name: garch_forecast
tools.description: GARCH(1,1) volatility forecast using maximum likelihood estimation

tools.name: zscore
tools.description: Rolling and static z-scores with extreme value detection

tools.name: distribution_fit
tools.description: Fit data to common distributions and rank by goodness of fit

tools.name: correlation_matrix
tools.description: Correlation and covariance matrices with optional eigenvalue decomposition

tools.name: realized_volatility
tools.description: Realized vol: close-to-close, Parkinson, Garman-Klass, Yang-Zhang estimators

tools.name: normal_distribution
tools.description: Normal distribution: CDF, PDF, quantile (inverse CDF), confidence intervals

tools.name: sharpe_ratio
tools.description: Standalone Sharpe ratio with Lo (2002) standard error and 95% CI

tools.name: probabilistic_sharpe
tools.description: Probabilistic Sharpe Ratio (Bailey & Lopez de Prado 2012) with min track record length

tools.name: impermanent_loss
tools.description: Impermanent loss calculator for Uniswap v2/v3 AMM positions

tools.name: apy_apr_convert
tools.description: Convert between APY and APR with configurable compounding frequency

tools.name: liquidation_price
tools.description: Liquidation price calculator for leveraged long/short positions

tools.name: funding_rate
tools.description: Funding rate analysis with annualization and regime detection

tools.name: dex_slippage
tools.description: DEX slippage estimator for constant-product AMM (x*y=k)

tools.name: vesting_schedule
tools.description: Token vesting schedule with cliff, linear/graded unlock, TGE

tools.name: rebalance
tools.description: Portfolio rebalance analyzer: drift detection and trade computation

tools.name: interest_rate_parity
tools.description: Interest rate parity calculator with forward premium and arbitrage detection

tools.name: ppp
tools.description: Purchasing power parity fair value estimation (Cassel 1918)

tools.name: forward_rate
tools.description: Bootstrap forward rates from a spot yield curve

tools.name: carry_trade
tools.description: Currency carry trade P&L decomposition: carry + spot return

tools.name: inflation_adjusted
tools.description: Nominal to real returns using exact Fisher equation

tools.name: taylor_rule
tools.description: Taylor Rule (1993) interest rate prescription

tools.name: real_yield
tools.description: Real yield and breakeven inflation from nominal and TIPS yields

tools.name: present_value
tools.description: Present value of a future lump sum and/or annuity stream (ordinary or due)

tools.name: future_value
tools.description: Future value of a present lump sum and/or annuity stream

tools.name: irr
tools.description: Internal rate of return via Newton-Raphson solver

tools.name: npv
tools.description: Net present value with profitability index and payback period

tools.name: cagr
tools.description: Compound annual growth rate with doubling time and forward projections

tools.name: options_spread-scan
tools.description: Scan and rank vertical spreads by risk/reward. Evaluates multiple strike combinations in one call. Replaces 8-16 individual options/price calls.

tools.name: indicators_regime-classify
tools.description: Combined regime classification: trend, volatility, RSI, direction, and strategy suggestion. Replaces technical + regime + realized-vol calls.

tools.name: risk_full-analysis
tools.description: Complete risk tearsheet: Sharpe, Sortino, VaR, CVaR, Kelly, drawdown, Hurst, CAGR in one call. Replaces 7 individual risk/stats calls.

tools.name: trade_evaluate
tools.description: Full trade evaluation: position sizing, risk/reward, Kelly, transaction costs, regime detection, technical signals, and go/no-go verdict. Replaces 5 individual calls.

tools.name: portfolio_health
tools.description: Portfolio health check: risk metrics, correlation matrix, drawdown, rebalance analysis, and stress test across 3 scenarios. Replaces 6 individual calls.

tools.name: pairs_signal
tools.description: Complete pairs trading signal: cointegration test, Hurst exponent, z-score, half-life, hedge ratio, and trade signal. Replaces 4 individual calls.

tools.name: batch
tools.description: Execute up to 100 computations in a single request. Price equals sum of individual endpoint prices. ~6x throughput vs sequential calls.
